title: phyllolobium eutrichus
intro: Phyllolobium eutrichus, also known as the Chinese buttonbush or buttonbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Phyllolobium eutrichus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder for medicinal use, and is also used in some herbal preparations to support immune function and overall well-being.
